frequency_snapshot.tie_rule: frequency_rank ascending; ties resolve by pair_id ascending

pairs.user_job: Review balance and next money action
pairs.rationale: A compact financial home makes balance, risk context, and one primary action scannable.

pairs.user_job: Authenticate before viewing protected money data
pairs.rationale: Trust-sensitive authentication needs explicit identity, validation, and recovery paths.

pairs.user_job: Compare products and choose a shortlist
pairs.rationale: List cards expose image, price, availability, and comparison affordances without clipping.

pairs.user_job: Confirm items, delivery, and total before ordering
pairs.rationale: Checkout must keep totals, shipping, consent, and the primary purchase action visible.

pairs.user_job: Find a route and understand arrival context
pairs.rationale: The map remains primary while route steps and action controls respect safe areas.

pairs.user_job: Reserve a trip and retain a scannable ticket
pairs.rationale: Reservation confirmation needs immutable trip facts and a resilient ticket state.

pairs.user_job: Browse nearby food options and prices
pairs.rationale: Dense list rows balance image recognition, dietary cues, price, and delivery time.

pairs.user_job: Track an order and contact support when delayed
pairs.rationale: Timeline progress and map context should remain readable during changing delivery states.

pairs.user_job: Scan updates and open a relevant discussion
pairs.rationale: A feed needs predictable rhythm, clear authorship, and stable actions around variable copy.

pairs.user_job: Compose and attach a post
pairs.rationale: Composition controls need keyboard-safe layout, validation, and explicit upload progress.

pairs.user_job: Read a conversation and send a reply
pairs.rationale: Chat content and composer need keyboard insets, message states, and resilient scrolling.

pairs.user_job: Triage unread conversations and alerts
pairs.rationale: Notification rows prioritize recency, read status, and a predictable deep-link target.

pairs.user_job: Consume media with clear playback controls
pairs.rationale: A viewer protects the media canvas while controls remain reachable and labelled.

pairs.user_job: Discover a relevant next item
pairs.rationale: Recommendation modules use a clear hierarchy and graceful empty/loading fallback.

pairs.user_job: Resume watching and browse the next title
pairs.rationale: Streaming home prioritizes resume actions while preserving browse context.

pairs.user_job: Evaluate a title before starting playback
pairs.rationale: Detail pages separate synopsis, metadata, and the primary play action.

pairs.user_job: Resume listening and find a mix
pairs.rationale: Audio home uses a strong resume affordance and scannable collection shelves.

pairs.user_job: Record, review, and save an audio clip
pairs.rationale: Recorder controls need large targets, clear elapsed status, and cancel confirmation.

pairs.user_job: Search destinations and dates
pairs.rationale: Search forms keep dates, occupancy, and the main search action legible on short screens.

pairs.user_job: Review a booking and retrieve a ticket
pairs.rationale: Booking details must expose date, identity, cancellation, and ticket actions in one flow.

pairs.user_job: Find a lesson or book by topic
pairs.rationale: Search results combine relevance, progress, and accessible filter controls.

pairs.user_job: Inspect course details and start learning
pairs.rationale: The detail view pairs outcomes, effort, and a clear start action.

pairs.user_job: See today's plan and progress
pairs.rationale: Health dashboards foreground one next action and a readable progress summary.

pairs.user_job: Adjust goals and get help with a plan
pairs.rationale: Support and preference controls need plain-language grouping and reachable actions.

pairs.user_job: Enter a protected clinical account
pairs.rationale: Clinical access makes privacy, validation, and recovery explicit before showing records.

pairs.user_job: Review a chronological care record
pairs.rationale: Clinical history needs stable chronology, source labels, and an error-safe empty state.

pairs.user_job: Set a safe first goal and understand support options
pairs.rationale: Gentle onboarding reduces cognitive load and makes privacy and support choices visible.

pairs.user_job: Manage privacy and contact support
pairs.rationale: High-trust settings separate data controls from help and emergency guidance.

pairs.user_job: Find age-appropriate guidance
pairs.rationale: Discovery controls accommodate quick scanning and long, reassuring copy.

pairs.user_job: Read advice and join a discussion
pairs.rationale: Community feed cards handle varied trust cues and long-copy wrapping.

pairs.user_job: See the next care task for a pet
pairs.rationale: Care dashboards make time-sensitive tasks and pet context immediately visible.

pairs.user_job: Book and confirm a care appointment
pairs.rationale: Appointment details preserve date, provider, and cancellation affordances.

pairs.user_job: Find homes by location and constraints
pairs.rationale: Real-estate search balances dense filters with map/list orientation changes.

pairs.user_job: Evaluate a property and contact an agent
pairs.rationale: Property detail separates photos, facts, map context, and contact action.

pairs.user_job: Find a service and available time
pairs.rationale: Service discovery keeps category, price, and availability aligned in a compact result.

pairs.user_job: Confirm a service booking
pairs.rationale: Booking confirmation exposes provider, time, preparation, and change actions.

pairs.user_job: Browse profiles and choose a conversation
pairs.rationale: Profile feed layouts prioritize identity cues, consent, and reversible actions.

pairs.user_job: Continue a consent-aware conversation
pairs.rationale: Chat keeps report/block actions discoverable and handles keyboard-safe composition.

pairs.user_job: Find relevant jobs using constraints
pairs.rationale: Job discovery supports filters, saved searches, and long titles without clipping.

pairs.user_job: Assess a job and start an application
pairs.rationale: Detail layouts make requirements, location, and one primary apply action readable.

pairs.user_job: See priorities and resume a work item
pairs.rationale: Work dashboards expose next actions while supporting dense but structured information.

pairs.user_job: Manage workspace preferences and support
pairs.rationale: Settings group account, notification, and workspace controls without hidden destructive actions.

pairs.user_job: Ask for help and inspect an answer
pairs.rationale: AI responses need explicit generation, empty, failure, and retry states with readable copy.

pairs.user_job: Attach context and submit a generation request
pairs.rationale: Prompt composition and attachment progress stay usable with long copy and keyboard overlap.

pairs.user_job: See device status and toggle a primary device
pairs.rationale: Control dashboards distinguish current status from the action affordance and offline state.

pairs.user_job: Configure a device and recover from connection errors
pairs.rationale: Device settings need explicit connectivity, permission, and destructive reset states.

pairs.user_job: Understand controls and start a first session
pairs.rationale: Tutorial steps teach interaction while preserving progress and skip choices.

pairs.user_job: Inspect a game scene and reach the next action
pairs.rationale: Immersive scenes keep controls discoverable without obscuring the game canvas.

pairs.user_job: View points and redeem a benefit
pairs.rationale: Wallet views make balance, expiry, and redemption feedback explicit.

pairs.user_job: Understand and share a reward offer
pairs.rationale: Referral flows state eligibility, progress, and share feedback without ambiguity.

pairs.user_job: Understand the service is starting
pairs.rationale: Launch state provides a stable branded transition without blocking content unexpectedly.

pairs.user_job: Move between core utility areas
pairs.rationale: Persistent navigation keeps labels, selected state, and safe-area spacing predictable.

pairs.user_job: Inspect balances and available funds
pairs.rationale: Money summaries must keep balances, account labels, and security actions distinct.

pairs.user_job: Audit recent money movement
pairs.rationale: Financial history needs dates, amounts, status, and safe empty/error states.

pairs.user_job: Inspect product information before adding to cart
pairs.rationale: Product detail balances media, variants, fulfilment, and one clear purchase path.

pairs.user_job: Apply a benefit and choose a payment method
pairs.rationale: Payment forms keep validation, applied discount, and confirmation legible.

pairs.user_job: Search a place or destination
pairs.rationale: Search prioritizes current location context and fast keyboard-safe completion.

pairs.user_job: Confirm a food order and delivery address
pairs.rationale: Checkout keeps address, substitutions, fees, and the final action visible above the keyboard.

pairs.user_job: Find people or topics to follow
pairs.rationale: Search handles no-result and long-label states while retaining filter context.

pairs.user_job: Sign in to a private conversation space
pairs.rationale: Messaging authentication explains verification and recovery without hiding trust signals.

pairs.user_job: Find a story, creator, or topic
pairs.rationale: Discovery results support mixed media types and predictable filter affordances.

pairs.user_job: Find a title quickly
pairs.rationale: Streaming search gives immediate feedback and preserves recent query context.

pairs.user_job: Find a track, artist, or playlist
pairs.rationale: Audio search keeps query focus, result type, and playback action distinct.

pairs.user_job: Narrow lodging options by trip constraints
pairs.rationale: Filter sheets preserve applied count and a clear reset/apply path.

pairs.user_job: Choose a learning goal and begin
pairs.rationale: Onboarding turns a broad catalog into one manageable first step.

pairs.user_job: Choose whether to share activity data
pairs.rationale: Permission copy states why data is needed and provides a safe denial path.

pairs.user_job: Choose access for a clinical capability
pairs.rationale: Clinical permissions distinguish optional access from required care actions.

pairs.user_job: Review reminders and time-sensitive updates
pairs.rationale: Notification hierarchy makes urgency, date, and child context easy to scan.

pairs.user_job: Find a nearby provider
pairs.rationale: Provider discovery exposes availability, distance, and trust signals without crowding.

pairs.user_job: Return to shortlisted homes
pairs.rationale: Saved results retain comparison context and explain when the list is empty.

pairs.user_job: Return to preferred services
pairs.rationale: Saved services support comparison and clear removal feedback.

pairs.user_job: Choose location and notification sharing
pairs.rationale: Consent is clear, granular, and reversible for a high-trust social flow.

pairs.user_job: Review jobs saved for later
pairs.rationale: Saved job rows keep status and next action visible across long titles.

pairs.user_job: Ask a teammate and attach context
pairs.rationale: Work chat supports long copy, attachments, and keyboard-safe composer states.

pairs.user_job: Understand capabilities and set a first task
pairs.rationale: Capability onboarding sets expectations before a user supplies sensitive context.

pairs.user_job: Allow local network or Bluetooth access
pairs.rationale: Device access explains capability, denial consequence, and retry path.

pairs.user_job: Choose a next game or challenge
pairs.rationale: Recommendations use clear progress cues and a calm empty fallback.

pairs.user_job: Review expiring points and reward updates
pairs.rationale: Rewards notifications emphasize expiry and a reversible next action.

pairs.user_job: Configure preferences and find help
pairs.rationale: Utility settings prioritize predictable grouping and an accessible support path.

pairs.user_job: Understand an order action completed
pairs.rationale: Success states summarize the result and provide one next route without ambiguity.

pairs.user_job: Understand that no saved utility items exist
pairs.rationale: A useful empty state explains the absence and offers one recoverable next action.

pairs.user_job: Recover when conversations cannot be loaded
pairs.rationale: Error recovery states name the problem and offer a bounded retry path.

pairs.user_job: Understand that product data is still loading
pairs.rationale: Loading placeholders preserve geometry and reduce layout shift before results arrive.
